message:
test: add E2E tests for diary, onboard, outcome, serve commands

Adds comprehensive E2E test coverage for remaining CLI commands:
- cli-diary.e2e.test.ts: diary generation tests
- cli-onboard.e2e.test.ts: onboarding workflow tests
- cli-outcome.e2e.test.ts: outcome recording tests
- cli-serve.e2e.test.ts: MCP HTTP server tests

Also includes:
- Enhanced diary command with --raw option support
- Doctor command improvements
- Remove deprecated security.ts re-export shim (use sanitize.ts directly)

All 2254 tests passing.

Co-Authored-By: TopazHill <agent@anthropic.com>
Co-Authored-By: QuietLynx <agent@anthropic.com>

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,8 +0,0 @@

-  sanitize,
-  compileExtraPatterns,
-  SECRET_PATTERNS,
-  type SanitizationConfig,
-  verifySanitization,
-} from "./sanitize.js";
